answer:
Higgsfield MCP is a hosted server at https://mcp.higgsfield.ai/mcp that enables AI agents to access 30+ image and video generation models—including Kling, Veo, Flux, and Sora—through an open standard interface [1][2][3]. It allows you to generate assets, train characters, and manage projects directly within chat interfaces like Claude, Cursor, or Claude Code [1][4][5].

To connect, add the URL as a custom connector or MCP server in your client's settings [6][4]. Authentication is handled via a one-time OAuth handshake with your Higgsfield account; no API keys are required [1][2][4].
